title: Phantom - Deep Dark
description: Visually reworks the Phantom to resemble the Deep Dark.
body:
# Introduction
A visual rework to the Monster of the Night Sky, **the Phantom**.

# Information
✅ Color palette is taken directly from the Warden. ✅

✅ Each pixel was reviewed to preserve the foundation of the Phantom's visual design. ✅

✨ Interested in more? Here's my [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/iSGducvO) that lowers the volume of Phantom noises! ✨

⚠️ **Free to use it in Modpacks when credited.** ⚠️
